title: Rei or Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Wed Feb 11, 2015 11:00 pm Alright, I know Anno doesn't like shipping in his movies and the chances of either one happening is slim, but since the rebuilds have a less darker tone than the original and the last movie will for sure have a different ending, I think their is a good chance it will be a happy ending. And if so let's say Shinji has to pick one to be with, who would you rather see him with.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Feb 11, 2015 11:27 pm Mari was introduced for a reason.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Feb 11, 2015 11:44 pm Asuka and Shinji will ALWAYS be my preferred ship of Evangelion, regardless of the circumstances, cause the first series made them so alike in so many ways. They are the pinnacle representation of the "hedgehog's dilemma". As for Rebuild, it's wishful thinking, but I at least hope they get on better terms.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Thu Feb 12, 2015 12:29 am ^Yea I agree, if their gonna make it happy and not ambiguous this time at least leave Asuka and Shinji on good terms. And what is Mari's purpose bc I have yet to figure it out yet.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Thu Feb 12, 2015 1:01 am Old Testament for LAS and New Testament LRS.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 12, 2015 1:25 am FINAL will definitely have some sort of closure to Rei and Shinji for sure. Back when NTE first began, Newtype articles claimed NTE would be heavily focused on Rei and Kaworu. Mari herself seemed to "ship" LAS in 3.0, but...For Asuka/Shinji, I hope they'll at least be on better terms at the end of FINAL than at the end of EoE. I don't necessarily think they'll be any actual shipping of Shinji/whoever except maybe via hints or a post-credits flash-forward. Unless FINAL goes troll route with Shinji/Sakura or Shinji/Mari. I am a fan of LAS for sure, but realistically speaking I'm not gonna hold my breath.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Feb 12, 2015 2:33 am Shinji & Sakura Suzuhara is the only true ship. Their kids would be so cute. (Plus she's like the only girl left alive who's kinda age appropriate & isn't a clone of his mom)

[]:             Quote Post by Cosmo11 » Thu Feb 12, 2015 6:34 am With Asuka, I just hope her and Shinji make amends. A romantic relationship is to unlikely at this point. With Rei, this isn't going to happen. She's dead for starters and I think it would be better for Shinji to move on from her.[/b]

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Feb 12, 2015 7:02 am ^ That and the fact Q insisted heavily on the fact they are technically half-sibling.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Feb 12, 2015 7:50 am ElMariachi wrote: That and the fact Q insisted heavily on the fact they are technically half-sibling.

[]: Re: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Feb 12, 2015 9:14 am EvangelionGodMode wrote: Alright, I know Anno doesn't like shipping in his movies and the chances of either one happening is slim, but since the rebuilds have a less darker tone than the original and the last movie will for sure have a different ending, I think their is a good chance it will be a happy ending. And if so let's say Shinji has to pick one to be with, who would you rather see him with.

[]: Re: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by Fredsq » Thu Feb 12, 2015 10:50 am EvangelionGodMode wrote: (…) but since the rebuilds have a less darker tone than the original (…)

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 12, 2015 1:52 pm Rei isn't even a person, she is something else. An alien being, to give a different perspective on humanity. She sees the whole picture (when she understands herslf) like in EoE. And Anno has described her as his unconscious. I don't see what would be the point in a relationship between her and Shinji (a romantic one). Now, Asuka is basically a woman. Their relationship has potential. We'll see if it's relevant in 3.0+1.0. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Thu Feb 12, 2015 2:19 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Rei isn't even a person, she is something else. An alien being, to give a different perspective on humanity. I don't see what would be the point in a relationship between her and Shinji (a romantic one).

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 12, 2015 3:23 pm Dataprime wrote: Hey, non-person people need lovin' too!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 12, 2015 5:03 pm So, what, KaworuXRei it finally is? I'd be okay with this.

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Thu Feb 12, 2015 5:44 pm Talk about What Measure Is A Non Human (which I think is incredibly unfair to Rei). Being the R/S shipper that I am (a minority in these here parts it seems), I am of course hoping to see that be what it ends up as. Plus, those two have been essentially one of the main focal points throughout this series (as opposed to when it was him and Asuka in the original series), so I am at least expecting to see some form of proper closure regarding their relationship. Who says a non-human can't become more human as time goes on? As for S/A, unless there is some serious development in the last film, I'm just gonna call it a case of Strangled By The Red String if they end up getting together in the end. Plus, Asuka's had like, 14 years of battles and the like that she's been through. Wouldn't be surprised if, like Meryl from MGS4, she's put her childish crush on Shinji away.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Feb 12, 2015 5:48 pm Grrr. Depending on how "human" is defined this time around Rei may or may not qualify (though she almost certainly would), but the notion that she is not a person is utter bollocks. She is self-aware, she has personality and identity, she has consciousness. There is no definition of person one could offer wherein she did not qualify.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 12, 2015 6:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So, what, KaworuXRei it finally is? I'd be okay with this.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Feb 12, 2015 6:19 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Rei is more than a person. She is a god..or something.
summary: []: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Wed Feb 11, 2015 11:00 pm Alright, I know Anno doesn't like shipping in his movies and the chances of either one happening is slim, but since the rebuilds have a less darker tone than the original and the last movie will for sure have a different ending, I think their is a good chance it will be a happy ending. And if so let's say Shinji has to pick one to be with, who
